spec_path.description: Absolute path to the Gutenberg page specification YAML file. Must pass validation (valid=true from validate_schema).

output_dir.description: Optional: Directory to write rendered HTML. Defaults to pages/rendered/. Directory is created if it doesn't exist.

html_path.description: Absolute path to the rendered HTML file. File is ready for deployment or further processing (screenshots, QA, etc.). All CSS is embedded (no external CDN).
